Financing Options

Funding Built for
How You Grow

Whether you need a lump sum, flexible access to credit, or revenue-based repayment — we have the right product for your business.

Term Loan

  • Flexible terms from 6–36 months
  • Bi-weekly or monthly payment options
  • Early payoff discounts available
  • No hard credit inquiries
  • Same-day funding available

Recommended for

Equipment purchases Hiring & payroll Inventory & supplies Renovations & build-outs Marketing campaigns

Line of Credit

  • Draw funds anytime, up to your approved limit
  • Only pay interest on what you use
  • Revolving — replenishes as you repay
  • No hard credit inquiries
  • Ideal for ongoing cash flow needs

Recommended for

Seasonal fluctuations Emergency expenses Ongoing operations Working capital

Revenue-Based Financing

  • Repay based on a small % of daily revenue
  • Payments flex with your cash flow
  • No fixed monthly payment to worry about
  • No collateral required
  • Great for high-volume merchants

Recommended for

MCA payoff Scaling operations Inventory expansion Merchant growth

HELOC

  • Leverage your home equity for business capital
  • Lower rates than unsecured products
  • Draw as needed up to your approved line
  • Interest-only payment option available
  • Large amounts available — up to $2M+

Recommended for

Large capital needs Lower cost financing Long-term investment Real estate

SBA Loans

  • Funding Up to $2 Million
  • Competitive Interest Rates
  • Terms Up to 25 Years
  • Low Monthly Payments
  • Flexible Use of Funds

Recommended for

Business acquisition Commercial real estate Equipment financing Long-term growth Working capital Startup funding Debt refinancing

FAQ

Common Questions About Business Funding

Most Momentum Capital applicants receive same-day approval, with funds wired as quickly as 24 hours after signing. Our streamlined process is built for speed without sacrificing clarity.

No. We perform a soft pull only during the application process, which does not impact your credit score. A hard inquiry is never made without your explicit consent.

You'll need at least $15,000 in monthly revenue, 4+ months in business, a 500+ FICO score, and 4 recent bank statements. That's it — no lengthy paperwork or business plans required.

Momentum Capital offers funding from $10,000 to $2,000,000 depending on your revenue, credit profile, and the product you select. Use our revenue calculator above to get an instant estimate.

We offer Term Loans, Lines of Credit, Revenue-Based Financing (MCA), HELOCs, and SBA Loans. Our advisors will help you choose the right product for your situation and goals.

Never. Applying with Momentum Capital is completely free. We only earn when you receive funding, so our interests are fully aligned with yours.
